text:
進撃gt20130218巨人 is the 3rd track on the "Attack on Titan" Original Soundtrack II. It is also the 4th track on disc 2 of the "Attack on Titan" Season 2 Original Soundtrack.

As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .

Title

gt - guitar

The guitar is used as the lead instrument with other string instruments used in the background.

Musical motifs

The track is a remix of eye-water, and therefore includes Call your name's bridge motif at 1:14-1:46.

All occurrences

Episode 2 - The narration describes the disastrous operation to retake Wall Maria
Episode 43 - Historia's memories of Frieda
